title: CatalogProductVariant
description: The specific version of the retail product that this menu item represents, defined by a unique combination of option values (for example, a T-Shirt with options `Red` and size `Small`).

id.description: The unique identifier for the product variant.

name.description: The name of the variant, for example, "T-Shirt - Small".

selectedOptions.description: List of selected options for the variant.

CatalogProductVariantOption.description: A selected option for a retail product variant.

id.description: The unique identifier for the product variant option.

name.description: The name of the product variant option, for example, "size".

sortOrder.description: The sort order of the product variant option.

CatalogProductOptionValue.description: A value within a catalog product option.

id.description: The unique identifier for the product option value.

name.description: The name of the product option value, for example, "small".

sortOrder.description: The sort order of the product option value.
